title: oreogrammitis crenulata
intro: Oreogrammitis crenulata, also known as the Crenulated Grass Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of New Guinea. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of Oreogrammitis crenulata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
